searchBar.description: Search bar — content-desc rotates (shoes, laptops, etc). No stable text selector. Use coordinate tap (300, 348) as primary strategy.

cartTab.description: Cart bottom navigation tab (shows badge count)

homeScreenTabRow.description: Top navigation tabs row — first ImageView confirms home screen is loaded

flipkartTab.description: Flipkart top nav tab — image-only React Native element, no accessibility node; coordinate tap (105,144)

minutesTab.description: Minutes top nav tab — content-desc is live countdown (unstable); coordinate tap (275,144) only

travelTab.description: Travel top nav tab — image-only React Native element; coordinate tap (445,144)

groceryTab.description: Grocery top nav tab — may trigger promo popup; coordinate tap (615,144)

android.uiautomator: new UiSelector().textContains("Flat no. 203, B Block, Tapovan")

deliveryAddress.description: Delivery address row below nav tabs — truncated in UI, use textContains with first ~30 chars

searchBox.description: Search box in home screen header — placeholder text rotates; coordinate tap (360,340) is reliable
